# Target inside

This note lives **inside** the trailing-dot folder. It is the target of an incoming wikilink from `note-pointing-in.md` (at the fixture root).

If a skill cannot enumerate the trailing-dot folder, this file is invisible — a rename pass cannot rename it, and a backlink-update pass cannot find the incoming reference to update.
